work_experience_normalized.position: Flight Dynamics, Orbit Determination (AX Airbus Xplorer)
work_experience_normalized.description: Curricular practicum and degree final project. Orbit determination for LEOP phase in CHEOPS mission. Flight dynamics interface & algorithm for orbit prediction.

work_experience_normalized.position: Bleed Air System Engineer & Consultant for Airbus (ATA36)
work_experience_normalized.description: Activities on behalf of Airbus ATA36 bleed air system design office on civil aircraft programs: Programs - A380, SACEO, SANE, A321neo XLR, SANE Pip, LR, Alize. V&V activities - LTRS, GTRS, FTRS, V&V summaries, SDD. Iterations with stakeholders (i.e., safety, FESRA, FTS, SEI) - Management of non-compliances - Control & monitoring activities - Support to Safety Impact Analysis (SIA) - SI (Special Instruction) requests for MAP/FAL (i.e., OHDS heat gun tests) - Customer support: RFW of A320CEO and MISP of SANE. Support to RCA, FTRS, FTLS. Collaboration with other ATASS for test procedures definition. Communication with supplier for equipment instrumentation and concessions. Deviation documentation and RDT/FCDAs for a permit to fly. Analysis of data from flight tests. - Training to new entry team members - Work on tools: DOORS, FUN2, OASIS-Sirocco - Knowledge on config. management and Airbus processes.

international_experience_normalized.institution_or_company: Queensland University of Technology (QUT), Brisbane & Royal Melbourne Institute of Technology (RMIT), Melbourne
